final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: fine-art illustration
Asset type: editorial art for cultural magazine, vertical poster
Primary request: a classical Chinese beauty in exquisite Hanfu seated on a wooden pavilion, holding a round fan, looking back into the distance
Scene/backdrop: Jiangnan water town setting, wooden pavilion surrounded by blooming lotus pond, pink and white lotus flowers swaying in breeze, dewdrops rolling on lotus leaves, white-walled black-tiled Hui-style architecture, winding bluestone paths, white egrets flying low over water
Subject: elegant classical Chinese lady wearing light cyan Hanfu with golden embroidery, intricate updo adorned with jade hairpins and pearl ornaments, refined delicate makeup, graceful posture with round silk fan in hand
Style/medium: fusion of gongbi (meticulous brushwork) and xieyi (freehand) Chinese painting styles, traditional Chinese ink wash with color
Composition/framing: symmetrical composition, medium shot with figure as focal point, pavilion and lotus pond as layered foreground and background
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight, gentle morning atmosphere, poetic and serene Eastern aesthetic mood
Color palette: soft cyan and gold for costume, pink and white lotus, emerald green leaves, muted ink gray architecture, warm cream paper tone
Materials/textures: flowing silk fabric with embroidered patterns, smooth jade and lustrous pearls, delicate paper fan, natural wood grain of pavilion, waxy lotus petals
Constraints: preserve the symmetrical composition and poetic Eastern aesthetic, maintain the fusion of gongbi detail and xieyi atmosphere
Avoid: photorealistic rendering, Western oil painting style, oversaturated neon colors, modern elements, deformed hands, cluttered composition
